de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.njml
This package provides the functionalities of parsing JML comments into KeY constructs.
de.uka.ilkd.key.util.mergerule
 
  • Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.util.mergerule used by de.uka.ilkd.key.axiom_abstraction
    Class
    Description
    SymbolicExecutionState
    A symbolic execution state is a pair of a symbolic state in form of a parallel update, and a path condition in form of a JavaDL formula.
  • Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.util.mergerule used by de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.merge
    Class
    Description
    SymbolicExecutionState
    A symbolic execution state is a pair of a symbolic state in form of a parallel update, and a path condition in form of a JavaDL formula.
    SymbolicExecutionStateWithProgCnt
    A symbolic execution state with program counter is a triple of a symbolic state in form of a parallel update, a path condition in form of a JavaDL formula, and a program counter in form of a JavaDL formula with non-empty Java Block (and a possible post condition as first, and only, sub term).
  • Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.util.mergerule used by de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.merge.procedures
    Class
    Description
    SymbolicExecutionState
    A symbolic execution state is a pair of a symbolic state in form of a parallel update, and a path condition in form of a JavaDL formula.

    Class
    Description
    MergeParamsSpec
    Specification of merge parameters for the creation of MergeContracts;
  • Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.util.mergerule used by de.uka.ilkd.key.util.mergerule
    Class
    Description
    SymbolicExecutionState
    A symbolic execution state is a pair of a symbolic state in form of a parallel update, and a path condition in form of a JavaDL formula.
    SymbolicExecutionStateWithProgCnt
    A symbolic execution state with program counter is a triple of a symbolic state in form of a parallel update, a path condition in form of a JavaDL formula, and a program counter in form of a JavaDL formula with non-empty Java Block (and a possible post condition as first, and only, sub term).
